    • Vision-Language Models
      • 2026
        • Trend analysis
        • Today's Digest
          • Context-Aware RL for Agentic and Multimodal LLMs
          • Look Again Before You Abstain:Budgeted Conformal Evidence Acquisition for Reliable Vision-Language Model
          • Cascaded Sparse Autoencoders Learn Multi-Level Visual Concepts in Multimodal LLMs
          • The Truth Stays in the Family: Enhancing Contextual Grounding via Inherited Truthful Heads in Model Lineages
          • Beyond English: Uncovering the Multilingual Gap in Vision-Language-Action Models
          • Metis: A Generalizable and Efficient World-Action Model for Autonomous Driving and Urban Navigation
          • Gaze Heads: How VLMs Look at What They Describe
          • Hy-Embodied-0.5-VLA: From Vision-Language-Action Models to a Real-World Robot Learning Stack
          • CORA: Analyzing and bridging thinking-answer gap in Multimodal RLVR via Consistency-Oriented Reasoning Alignment
          • What Drives Test-Time Adaptation for CLIP? A Controlled Empirical Study from an Update Perspective
          • One Layer's Trash is Another Layer's Treasure: Adaptive Layer-wise Visual Token Selection in LVLMs
          • Mirage Probes: How Vision Models Fake Visual Understanding
          • $μ_0$: A Scalable 3D Interaction-Trace World Model
          • PP-OCRv6: From 1.5M to 34.5M Parameters, Surpassing Billion-Scale VLMs on OCR Tasks
          • Trajectory-Level Redirection Attacks on Vision-Language-Action Models
        • Paper list
      • 2025
        • Trend analysis
        • Yearly Digest
          • OpenCUA: Open Foundations for Computer-Use Agents
          • Towards Visualization-of-Thought Jailbreak Attack against Large Visual Language Models
          • Visual Structures Help Visual Reasoning: Addressing the Binding Problem in LVLMs
          • Towards General Continuous Memory for Vision-Language Models
          • Knowledge Insulating Vision-Language-Action Models: Train Fast, Run Fast, Generalize Better
          • Real-Time Execution of Action Chunking Flow Policies
          • Unveiling the Compositional Ability Gap in Vision-Language Reasoning Model
          • OpenVLThinker: Complex Vision-Language Reasoning via Iterative SFT-RL Cycles
          • GRIT: Teaching MLLMs to Think with Images
          • The Narrow Gate: Localized Image-Text Communication in Native Multimodal Models
          • Too Late to Recall: Explaining the Two-Hop Problem in Multimodal Knowledge Retrieval
          • Eagle 2.5: Boosting Long-Context Post-Training for Frontier Vision-Language Models
          • SafeVLA: Towards Safety Alignment of Vision-Language-Action Model via Constrained Learning
          • ForceVLA: Enhancing VLA Models with a Force-aware MoE for Contact-rich Manipulation
          • From Flat to Hierarchical: Extracting Sparse Representations with Matching Pursuit
          • ViCrit: A Verifiable Reinforcement Learning Proxy Task for Visual Perception in VLMs
        • Paper list
    • Foundation Models in Medicine
      • 2026
        • Trend analysis
        • Today's Digest
          • Masked and Predictive Self-Supervised Foundation Models for 3D Brain MRI
          • Counterfactual Evaluation Reveals Hidden Capability Profiles in Clinical LLMs and Agents
          • Why Specialist Models Still Matter: A Heterogeneous Multi-Agent Paradigm for Medical Artificial Intelligence
          • MedFM-Robust: Benchmarking Robustness of Medical Foundation Models
          • CLR-voyance: Reinforcing Open-Ended Reasoning for Inpatient Clinical Decision Support with Outcome-Aware Rubrics
          • Benchmarking Foundation Models for Renal Lesion Stratification in CT
          • Safety and accuracy follow different scaling laws in clinical large language models
          • Project Imaging-X: A Survey of 1000+ Open-Access Medical Imaging Datasets for Foundation Model Development
          • EyeWorld: A Generative World Model of Ocular State and Dynamics
          • Designing UNICORN: a Unified Benchmark for Imaging in Computational Pathology, Radiology, and Natural Language
          • Specializing Foundation Models via Mixture of Low-Rank Experts for Comprehensive Head CT Analysis
          • Free Lunch in Medical Image Foundation Model Pre-training via Randomized Synthesis and Disentanglement
          • Uncovering Modality Discrepancy and Generalization Illusion for General-Purpose 3D Medical Segmentation
          • A Hierarchical Benchmark of Foundation Models for Dermatology
          • UniX: Unifying Autoregression and Diffusion for Chest X-Ray Understanding and Generation
        • Paper list
      • 2025
        • Trend analysis
        • Yearly Digest
          • Revisiting 2D Foundation Models for Scalable 3D Medical Image Classification
          • UMind-VL: A Generalist Ultrasound Vision-Language Model for Unified Grounded Perception and Comprehensive Interpretation

          • CardioBench: Do Echocardiography Foundation Models Generalize Beyond the Lab?
          • Citrus-V: Advancing Medical Foundation Models with Unified Medical Image Grounding for Clinical Reasoning

          • CheXWorld: Exploring Image World Modeling for Radiograph Representation Learning

    • Agentic AI / LLM Agents
      • 2026
        • Trend analysis
        • Today's Digest
          • DEEPRUBRIC: Evidence-Tree Rubric Supervision for Efficient Reinforcement Learning of Deep Research Agents
          • TokenPilot: Cache-Efficient Context Management for LLM Agents
          • Greed Is Learned: Visible Incentives as Reward-Hacking Triggers
          • OpenClaw-Skill: Collective Skill Tree Search for Agentic Large Language Models
          • Skill-to-LoRA: From Using Skills to Learning Behaviors for Token-Efficient LLM Agents
          • A First-Principles Derivation of LLM Policy Optimization: From Expected Reward to GRPO and Its Structural Extensions
          • User as Code: Executable Memory for Personalized Agents
          • VeriGraph: Towards Verifiable Data-Analytic Agents
          • SING: Synthetic Intention Graph for Scalable Active Tool Discovery in LLM Agents
          • When Errors Become Narratives: A Longitudinal Taxonomy of Silent Failures in a Production LLM Agent Runtime
          • From Shield to Target: Denial-of-Service Attacks on LLM-Based Agent Guardrails
          • From Chatbot to Digital Colleague: The Paradigm Shift Toward Persistent Autonomous AI
          • When the Tool Decides: LLM Agents Defer Blindly to Graph Neural Network Tools, and Stronger Backbones Defer More
          • GitOfThoughts: Version-Controlled Reasoning and Agent Memory You Can Replay, Diff, and Merge
          • tap: A File-Based Protocol for Heterogeneous LLM Agent Collaboration
          • AgentCyberRange: Benchmarking Frontier AI Systems in Realistic Cyber Ranges
          • HarnessX: A Composable, Adaptive, and Evolvable Agent Harness Foundry
          • Closing the Reflection Gap: A Free Calibration Bonus for Agentic RL
          • APPO: Agentic Procedural Policy Optimization
        • Paper list
      • 2025
        • Trend analysis

          • Toward Training Superintelligent Software Agents through Self-Play SWE-RL

          • Small Language Models for Efficient Agentic Tool Calling: Outperforming Large Models with Targeted Fine-tuning

          • Finch: Benchmarking Finance & Accounting across Spreadsheet-Centric Enterprise Workflows
          • GTR-Turbo: Merged Checkpoint is Secretly a Free Teacher for Agentic VLM Training
          • Factor(U,T): Controlling Untrusted AI by Monitoring their Plans
